headline: Carrier Global Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Earnings
summary: Carrier Global Corp (NYSE: CARR) beat Q1 expectations and reaffirmed guidance. Analysts raised price targets following earnings. Stock rose 1.1%.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Carrier Global, Raises Price Target to $79
summary: Citigroup  analyst Andrew Kaplowitz   maintains Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $72 to $79.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Carrier Global, Raises Price Target to $79

headline: Carrier Global (CARR) Is Up 9.1% After Q1 Beat Driven By Surging Data Center Orders
summary: Carrier Global Corporation has released its Q1 2026 results, reporting revenue of US$5,341 million with lower net income of US$238 million, while reaffirming full-year sales and adjusted EPS guidance amid tariff and macroeconomic pressures. Beneath the headline numbers, very large growth in data center orders and resilient commercial and aftermarket HVAC demand underpinned the stronger-than-expected quarter and reinforced Carrier’s data center cooling ambitions. We’ll now examine how the...
